title: Copper-ish Swords!
description: A sweet and simple sword overlay for Minecraft 1.21.5 that retextures the diamond to a copper style material! Modifies all sword material types.
body:
# **Copper-ish Swords!** 🗡️
Spice up- or copper up? your taste of sword!

## What is it? 🗺️
A sword retexture made for survival, but can be used for any playstyle or gamemode!
Changes the diamond sword to a copper texture, also alters other sword material types.

## What does it contain? 🛡️
Retextures the swords for version 1.21.5!

### Notes about Copper-ish Swords 🍃
This pack was made for vanilla Java 1.21.5, it should work with any mods that don't alter
sword textures! Be sure to move it to the top of the applied texturepacks for the overlay
to take priority if you have any other texturepacks enabled.

![Pack by VanillaSpooks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3889775c84046107bcbd901afc5eea59206b4b4f.png)
